title: Line editing via rustyline or reedline
description: Replace BufReader<stdin> with rustyline or reedline for arrow-key editing, Ctrl+A/E, and input history. Currently the single biggest UX gap — nothing else matters much if you cannot edit what you type. Must interoperate with tokio's async loop; rustyline has a tokio-compatible async API.
close_reason: rustyline DefaultEditor in spawn_blocking thread, lines sent via mpsc channel to async loop; all prompt redraws removed
